ZDNET reports that AI platform teams are rebuilding their deployment playbooks around observability, rollback discipline, and tighter review loops.

Watch now

Leaders are asking how fast they can disable a failing path, what signals indicate retrieval quality is slipping, and how operators prove a fix after an incident.

ZDNET Recommends

The result is that teams shipping AI into production are documenting more explicit fallback paths and audit checkpoints before expansion.

Editor's note: This article was updated after publication.
